items.error: First run reported evidence manifest is missing because it was executed in parallel with evidence-manifest writing.
items.lesson: Run evidence-manifest writing before merge-readiness; do not parallelize readiness checks that read freshly generated evidence.
items.evidence: The same merge-readiness command passed when rerun after .project-governor/evidence/2026-04-29-init-entrypoint-consolidation/EVIDENCE.json existed.
